details.test: Task 1: Bathroom full remodel quote request flow
Task 2: Select cheaper kitchen service and add configured project item
Task 3: Book kitchen design consultation (weekday evening, 7+ days out)
Task 4: Kitchen design consult project with mid-tier config and promo applied
Task 5: Add three different services to project plan and verify items
Task 6: Select service with warranty & free inspection, then book service visit
Task 8: Save modern kitchen inspiration ideas to Favorites and verify
Task 9: Select second-cheapest bathroom+flooring bundle, add extra service, submit project
